original_text:
The three approved brand colors in hierarchy order are: (1) 
#00529B Deep Blue (dominant), (2) 
#FAA31B Amber Orange (secondary accent), (3) 
#FFC60A Golden Yellow (tertiary accent).

Agenda, is the primary headline font
and should be used for all headlines and headers.
Nunito Sans should be used for
all body copy in print.

Agenda:


Nunito Sans:
https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Nunito+Sans:ital,opsz,wght@0,6..12,200..1000;1,6..12,200..1000&display=swap" rel="stylesheet

use this shape and treatment for CTAs:

<svg width="180" height="59" viewBox="0 0 180 59" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d="M0 25C0 11.1929 11.1929 0 25 0H177.5C178.605 0 179.5 0.895431 179.5 2V33.5C179.5 47.3071 168.307 58.5 154.5 58.5H2C0.895433 58.5 0 57.6046 0 56.5V25Z" fill="url(#paint0_linear_75_5202)"/> <defs> <linearGradient id="paint0_linear_75_5202" x1="0" y1="29.25" x2="179.5" y2="29.25" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse"> <stop stop-color="`#FFDF55`"/> <stop offset="1" stop-color="`#FAA21B`"/> </linearGradient> </defs> </svg>

#00529B Deep Blue (dominant), (2) 
#FAA31B Amber Orange (secondary accent), (3) 
#FFC60A Golden Yellow (tertiary accent).

The three approved brand colors in hierarchy order are: (1) 
#00529B Deep Blue (dominant), (2) 
#FAA31B Amber Orange (secondary accent), (3) 
#FFC60A Golden Yellow (tertiary accent).

rules.intent: Maintain strict, recognizable brand color hierarchy across banner elements.
rules.rule_text: Apply the three approved brand colors strictly according to their hierarchy: (1) dominant Deep Blue (color.primary.brand_blue = #00529B), (2) secondary accent Amber Orange (color.primary.sunshine = #FAA31B), and (3) tertiary accent Golden Yellow (color.primary.gold = #FFC60A).

quotes:
Agenda, is the primary headline font
and should be used for all headlines and headers.

Nunito Sans should be used for
all body copy

Agenda, is the primary headline font
and should be used for all headlines and headers.

Nunito Sans should be used for
all body copy in print.

rules.intent: Ensure distinct brand typographic roles for headlines versus copy.
rules.rule_text: Use Agenda (font.family.agenda = Agenda) for all headlines and headers. Use Nunito Sans (font.stack.email = 'Nunito Sans', Verdana, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif) for body copy.

quotes: use this shape and treatment for CTAs:
use this shape and treatment for CTAs:

<svg width="180" height="59" viewBox="0 0 180 59" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d="M0 25C0 11.1929 11.1929 0 25 0H177.5C178.605 0 179.5 0.895431 179.5 2V33.5C179.5 47.3071 168.307 58.5 154.5 58.5H2C0.895433 58.5 0 57.6046 0 56.5V25Z" fill="url(#paint0_linear_75_5202)"/> <defs> <linearGradient id="paint0_linear_75_5202" x1="0" y1="29.25" x2="179.5" y2="29.25" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse"> <stop stop-color="`#FFDF55`"/> <stop offset="1" stop-color="`#FAA21B`"/> </linearGradient> </defs> </svg>

rules.intent: Unify banner design execution with the highly recognizable signature asymmetric banner button shape and brand gradient.
rules.rule_text: CTAs must utilize the asymmetric rounded vector shape (gradient_banner.button.radius = 49.52px 1.76px 40px 1.76px) filled with the linear gradient transitioning from SVG Yellow (#FFDF55) to SVG Orange (#FAA21B).
